tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Calculate vitamin D synthesis at a given location and time. Returns sun position, UV index, IU/min, minutes to reach the target dose, MED (sunburn threshold), the peak window, and optional 15-min day / monthly year curves. UV index uses a live satellite-driven forecast where available, with a clear-

tools.name: geocode
tools.description: Turn a place name, postal code, or "code, CC" string into { lat, lon, label }. Auto-detects US/CA/GB/NL/JP/BR postal patterns; ambiguous digit-only codes default to US unless the caller appends a country code (e.g. "10115, DE"). Falls back to Open-Meteo place-name search for everything else.

tools.name: describe_skin_types
tools.description: Returns the six Fitzpatrick skin types with sun-reactivity behavior and descriptive ancestry hints. Call this when the user's skin type is unknown so you can pick the closest match before calling calculate.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "describe_skin_types" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Returns the six Fitzpatrick skin types with sun-reactivity behavior and descriptive ancestry hints. Call this when the user's skin type is unknown so you can pi…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
